narrative:
Tuscarawas (precinct in Coshocton County) has 926 registered voters, with 63.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a clear Republican lean of 9.7 percentage points.
